creator: Kyle Smith
source_text:
Comment “TASTY” and I’ll send you the FULL recipe!

📚 Want 233+ macro-friendly recipes that actually taste amazing? Comment “COOKBOOK” and I’ll send you the link to my Tasty Shreds cookbook!

These Protein Buffalo Chicken Sticks are about to become a weekly staple. 🤤🔥

✅ Only 271 calories
💪 40g protein
🌶️ Loaded with buffalo flavor
🧀 Cheesy, crispy, and perfect for meal prep.

You’d never guess these are packed with almost 40g of protein each! Make a batch, throw them in the fridge, and you’ve got high-protein lunches and snacks ready all week.
notes: Agent-labeled from the frozen Instagram description before viewing parser output; the caption names the preparation but gates the full recipe externally.
Accepted after demonstrative-subject titles and emoji-prefixed nutrition values were handled structurally.
